title: senecio subumbellatus
intro: Senecio subumbellatus, also known as the round-leaved ragwort, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the eastern regions of Australia. The plant contains various compounds with medicinal properties, including alkaloids and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio subumbellatus include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions, including fever and digestive issues.
